mapper.select:
SELECT b.RESERVATION_ID AS id, TO_CHAR(b.RESERVATION_ID) AS resId, /* 이미지에 RES_ID가 없으므로 PK를 문자열로 변환 */ r.ROOM_NAME AS roomName, m.USERNAME AS username, /* 날짜 컬럼명: CHECK_IN_DATE, CHECK_OUT_DATE */ TO_CHAR(b.CHECK_IN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ~ ' || TO_CHAR(b.CHECK_OUT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS duration, /* 금액 컬럼명: AMOUNT */ '₩ ' || TO_CHAR(b.AMOUNT, 'FM999,999,999') AS totalPrice,
/* 상태 컬럼명: STATUS (VARCHAR2) */ b.STATUS AS statusText, CASE WHEN b.STATUS = '예약 확정' THEN 'badge-done' WHEN b.STATUS = '예약 취소' THEN 'badge-danger' ELSE 'badge-wait' END AS statusClass FROM RESERVATION b LEFT JOIN ROOM r ON b.ROOM_ID = r.ROOM_ID LEFT JOIN MEMBER1 m ON b.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID WHERE b.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY b.RESERVATION_ID DESC

SELECT b.RESERVATION_ID AS id, '#' || b.RESERVATION_ID AS resId, m.USERNAME AS username, r.ROOM_NAME AS roomName, TO_CHAR(b.CHECK_IN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ~ ' || TO_CHAR(b.CHECK_OUT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS duration, '₩ ' || TO_CHAR(b.AMOUNT, 'FM999,999,999') AS totalPrice, b.STATUS AS statusText, CASE WHEN b.STATUS = '예약 확정' THEN 'badge-done' WHEN b.STATUS = '예약 취소' THEN 'badge-danger' ELSE 'badge-wait' END AS statusClass FROM RESERVATION b JOIN MEMBER1 m ON b.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN ROOM r ON b.ROOM_ID = r.ROOM_ID ORDER BY b.RESERVATION_ID DESC

SELECT b.RESERVATION_ID AS id, '#' || b.RESERVATION_ID AS resId, r.ROOM_NAME AS roomName, TO_CHAR(b.CHECK_IN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ~ ' || TO_CHAR(b.CHECK_OUT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS duration, '₩ ' || TO_CHAR(b.AMOUNT, 'FM999,999,999') AS totalPrice, b.STATUS AS statusText, CASE WHEN b.STATUS = '예약 확정' THEN 'badge-done' WHEN b.STATUS = '예약 취소' THEN 'badge-danger' ELSE 'badge-wait' END AS statusClass FROM RESERVATION b LEFT JOIN ROOM r ON b.ROOM_ID = r.ROOM_ID WHERE b.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY b.RESERVATION_ID DESC
